queries.question: Show me salads and soups served at the Hilton.
queries.sql:
SELECT Salads.name
FROM Salads
WHERE Salads.BuffetName = "Hilton"
UNION
SELECT Soups.name
FROM Soups
WHERE Soups.BuffetName = "Hilton"
